Push A.description: Primary horizontal push day emphasizing upper chest through incline pressing. Machine-based movements accommodate pec injury history — no free bar bench, stop at 90° elbow bend, never to failure on pressing.

Push B.description: Vertical push priority with overhead pressing as primary movement. Lower chest work via high-to-low cables.

Pull A.description: Heavy hip hinge day with conventional deadlift as primary strength movement. Vertical pulling for lat width.

Pull B.description: Horizontal rowing emphasis for mid-back thickness and trap development. No deadlift.

Legs A.description: Quad-dominant leg day with leg press as primary compound. Includes leg curl for hamstring balance.

Legs B.description: Hamstring and glute dominant day. Smith RDL as primary hip hinge.

Rest.description: Active recovery day. Light stretching, foam rolling, or walking.
